sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter)
feat.text: Your weapons are a blur, blocking and biting at your foes. You can use Twin Riposte even if you aren’t benefiting from Twin Parry. At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to make a Twin Riposte.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

archetype.name: Avenger
archetype.note: This archetype offers Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter) at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Dual-Weapon Warrior
archetype.note: This archetype offers Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter) at a different level than displayed here.
